title: Jamaican Chicken Wrap
description: A delicious and flavorful wrap filled with juicy Jamaican chicken, wrapped in a tender tortilla.

ingredients.name: Shredded Cheese
ingredients.notes: Monterey Jack or Cheddar work well

ingredients.name: Diced Onions
ingredients.notes: Red or yellow onions work well

ingredients.name: Diced Bell Peppers
ingredients.notes: Green or red bell peppers work well

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breast with Jamaican Jerk Seasoning and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Slice the cooked chicken breast into thin strips.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the microwave or on the grill for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading a layer of sour cream on the tortilla, followed by the sliced chicken, diced onions, diced bell peppers, sliced cucumber, and sliced tomato.
Top with shredded cheese and fold the wrap in half to enclose.
